description.en: Ultra-compact portable EV charger with adjustable current (8-16A). Schuko plug, OLED display, IP65 rated for all-weather use.
description.zh: 超紧凑便携式充电器，电流可调（8-16A）。Schuko插头，OLED显示屏，IP65防护等级，全天候使用。

features: Compatible with all EVs on market

specifications.rcd: Type AC 30mA / RCMU Type A+DC6mA optional

specifications.rcd: Type A

description.en: High-power compact DC charger with 80KW output and 250A max current. Versatile for retail, workplace, and fleet applications.
description.zh: 大功率紧凑型直流充电桩，80KW输出，最大250A电流。适用于零售、办公和车队场景。

description.en: Lightweight mobile DC charger with trolley. Plug-and-charge simplicity — just plug in and charging starts automatically.
description.zh: 轻量化移动式直流快充，配备推车。即插即充——插入即自动启动充电。

specifications.rcd: Type A

description.en: Higher-power mobile DC charger with 40KW output and trolley. Plug-and-charge for flexible deployment.
description.zh: 大功率移动直流充电桩，40KW输出配移动推车。即插即充，灵活部署。

description.en: 120KW DC fast charger with 55" advertising display (3480×2160). Dual CCS2 output, remote AD management. Revenue from charging + advertising.
description.zh: 120KW直流快充，55寸广告屏（3480×2160）。双CCS2输出，远程广告管理。充电+广告双重收益。

features: Remote AD content update via network

specifications.rcd: Type A / Type B optional

description.en: Dual-output 120KW Super DC charger with PTB certified meter. Constant power 150-1000V, OCPP 1.6J, Plug&Charge DIN70121 ready.
description.zh: 双输出120KW超级直流快充，PTB认证电表。恒功率150-1000V，OCPP 1.6J，DIN70121即插即充。

specifications.rcd: Type A

description.en: Dual-output 150KW DC charger with PTB meter option. Constant power 150-1000V, OCPP 1.6J, air cooled design.
description.zh: 双输出150KW直流充电桩，可选PTB认证计量。150-1000V恒功率，OCPP 1.6J，风冷设计。

description.zh: 双输出180KW直流充电桩。商业充电站功率与成本的理想平衡。

description.en: High-power 240KW dual-output DC charger with air cooling. Constant power 150-1000V, suitable for highway and high-traffic stations.
description.zh: 大功率240KW双输出直流快充，风冷散热。恒功率150-1000V，适用于高速公路和高流量站点。

specifications.rcd: Type A

description.en: High-power 300KW DC charger with dual output. DIN70121 Plug&Charge ready for highway and fleet charging.
description.zh: 大功率300KW直流充电桩，双输出。支持DIN70121即插即充，适用于高速公路和车队充电。

description.en: Ultra-high-power 360KW DC charger with DIN70121 Plug&Charge. Dual output for simultaneous fast charging at highway stations.
description.zh: 超大功率360KW直流快充，DIN70121即插即充。双输出同时快充，适用于高速公路充电站。

specifications.rcd: Type A

description.en: Versatile 3-in-1 charger: AC Type2 22KW + CCS2 60KW DC + CHAdeMO 60KW DC. Three outputs serve all EV standards simultaneously.
description.zh: 多功能三合一充电桩：AC Type2 22KW + CCS2 60KW直流 + CHAdeMO 60KW直流。三输出兼容所有标准。

features: MID AC meter + PTB DC meter optional

specifications.rcd: Type A / Type B optional
specifications.energyMeter: MID certified (AC) / CE or PTB certified (DC)

description.en: Split-design 480KW DC system with up to 8 outputs. Flexible power distribution, liquid cooling 500A optional. For ultra-fast charging hubs.
description.zh: 分体式480KW直流快充系统，最多8路输出。灵活功率分配，液冷500A可选。适用于超级快充站。

features: Up to 8 outputs with smart power sharing

specifications.display: 7" color touch LCD + LED + emergency stop

description.en: Mid-tier split DC charging system with 600KW capacity. Supports both conventional (250A) and liquid-cooled (600A) charging terminals.
description.zh: 中档分体式直流充电系统，600KW容量。支持常规（250A）和液冷（600A）充电终端。

description.en: Flagship 720KW split DC system with liquid cooling 600A. Operates -30°C to +70°C. Maximum power for ultra-fast charging infrastructure.
description.zh: 旗舰720KW分体式直流快充系统，液冷600A。工作温度-30°C至+70°C。超级快充基础设施的最大功率解决方案。

features: Up to 8 outputs with smart power sharing
Remote control, diagnosis, and OTA upgrades

specifications.display: 7" color touch LCD + LED + emergency stop

description.en: Integrated 480KW energy storage + charging system with 215KWh battery. V2G capable, solar MPPT, and cloud-based EMS for smart energy management.
description.zh: 集成式480KW储充一体化系统，215KWh电池组。支持V2G、光伏MPPT、云端EMS智能能源管理。

specifications.fireProtection: Temperature-activated + fire probe + air pressure sensor

description.en: Wall-mounted 10KWh home energy storage with 8KW inverter. Solar MPPT, APP controlled, 10-year warranty. Scalable with Panel+ units.
description.zh: 壁挂式10KWh家用储能系统，8KW逆变器。光伏MPPT，APP控制，10年质保。可通过Panel+扩展。

features: Wall-mount sleek design with LED lighting
